- BR center: Wgg / WRW / Wgg
- BL center: Wgg / WRW / ggW
The bottom-right sub-cell differs: BR has W, BL has g. I need to figure out how to change the center pattern. Maybe I need to click on the sub-cells within the center cell? The center cell is at rows 44-49, cols 44-49 in the BR container. The sub-grid is 3x3 where each sub-cell is 2x2.
The bottom-right sub-cell would be at rows 48-49, cols 48-49. Let me try clicking there.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
